settings.eyebrow: For the dogs who raised us
settings.heading: Make his golden years his best.
settings.subheading: Orthopedic beds, mobility ramps, and vet-reviewed calm. Built for dogs 7+.

settings.quote: Our 13-year-old Lab Bailey sleeps through the night for the first time in a year.
settings.author: Megan H.

settings.quote: The car ramp gave us our weekend drives back. Duke used to refuse to get in.

settings.quote: Calming vest worked the first thunderstorm. Finally.
settings.author: Priya S.

settings.question: When is a dog considered senior?
settings.answer: Most vets call a dog senior at age 7. Large breeds (Labs, Goldens, Great Danes) age faster and may benefit from orthopedic support as early as 5–6.

settings.question: How do I know if my dog needs an orthopedic bed?
settings.answer: Signs include: slower to rise, favoring one leg, restlessness at night, shifting positions often while lying down, or visible stiffness after naps.

settings.question: What's your shipping timeline?
settings.answer: Free on US orders $49+. Most items ship from US warehouses in 1–2 business days with delivery in 5–8 days total.

settings.question: Returns?
settings.answer: 30-day satisfaction guarantee. If it doesn't work for your dog, email us and we'll make it right.
